manufacturer_from_details: ‎ Shen Zhen Starway Photoelectric Technology Co., Ltd.
features: 【Extra Long String Lights】 The 100M bright warm white lighting string lights have 800 LED lights, 8 LED lights per 10M. It's long enough to wrap around your Christmas tree, desk, sofa, and window for indoor and outdoor decoration.

【Warm White Outdoor Fairy Lights】 For girls and children, with these warm white fairy lights, they will be happy with such a romantic atmosphere and like the fantastic scene. It is time to add a festive look to your family!

【Timer Settings and Adjustable Brightness 】Press button for 3 seconds to set and reset timer, the green light which on transformer will beon, and the string light will be on 6 hours, then will be off 18 hours. String lights tailor your lighting experience with four adjustable brightness levels: 100%, 75%, 50%, and 25%.

【8 Twinkle Modes】 These fairy lights have 8 flashing modes to fit different occasions, moods, feelings, holidays, festivals, anniversaries, etc. Adjust the lighting modes by pressing the round button on the adapter or pressing the remote number.

【IP65 Waterproof】 The LED Christmas lights outdoor have passed IP65 waterproof certification. All of the LEDs are filled with hot melt adhesive layers, the anti-freezing and anti-oxidation performance will ensure longer service life. It's perfect for Patio, Garden, Yard, Porch, Restaurant, Fence, Park, Hotel, Commercial building, Shopping center, etc. (Do not put the bulb in water.) Please keep the power supply away from water or rain as the power supply itself is not waterproof.
description: Product Description Wind -proof Waterproof Design Christmas lights are waterproof and can support light rain, which makes them perfect for inner and outer decoration. However, keep in mind that the power supply is not water resistant. You must protect or keep it away from water. 4 Adjustable Levels 100%-75%-50%-25%4 levels of brightness, you can create a comfortable environment according to your needs according to the occasion. Timer function: You don't need to restore the time when you turn on the light again. Save valuable time. Create a wonderful atmosphere and enjoy a holiday with your loved ones. Use Christmas lights to wrap trees, chimneys, houses or other places you want to decorate. From the Christmas tree to the blinking lights of the house, there is a festive atmosphere everywhere! The light chain can not only be used as Christmas lights, but also as perfect decoration for parties, creating a romantic atmosphere and an impressive landscape. Different flashing and adjustable ways make your life more romantic and unforgettable! The wire can bend and give it any form. Wrap them around the fence or trees to illuminate their home and garden. Idea for Christmas, Valentine's Day, party, wedding, showcase, home, bathroom, celebrations, vacations, shows, restaurant, hotel, commercial building, shopping center, etc., interior and exterior decorations to create a romantic and relaxing atmosphere.
